# Digital Pillars

> Digital Pillars is a Manchester-based web design and software agency. We build websites, web applications, digital strategy and AI automation for UK businesses that want more enquiries, clearer systems and sustainable growth.

## Site

- Home: https://digitalpillars.co.uk/
- About: https://digitalpillars.co.uk/about
- Services: https://digitalpillars.co.uk/services
- Our work: https://digitalpillars.co.uk/our-work
- Contact: https://digitalpillars.co.uk/contact
- Free homepage design: https://digitalpillars.co.uk/free-homepage-design

## Services

- Website design & development
- Software & web applications
- Digital strategy & consulting
- AI & automation

## Case studies

- Greenfield Estates: https://digitalpillars.co.uk/our-work/greenfield-estates
- F.A.I.T.H: https://digitalpillars.co.uk/our-work/faith-uk
